Name: UActorComponent

Variables.Name: PrimaryComponentTick
Variables.Description: Main tick function for the Actor

Variables.Name: DSTickInterval
Variables.Description:
The frequency in seconds at which this tick function will be executed on DS.  If less than or equal to 0 then it will tick every frame
	 If greater than 0 will cover PrimaryComponentTick.TickInterval
	 Add by zoranouyang

Variables.Name: ComponentTags
Variables.Description: Array of tags that can be used for grouping and categorizing. Can also be accessed from scripting.

Variables.Name: bAllowBPReceiveTickEvent
Variables.Description: If true, bp tick will be called , otherwise skipped

Variables.Name: bReplicates
Variables.Description: Is this component currently replicating? Should the network code consider it for replication? Owning Actor must be replicating first!

Variables.Name: bNetAddressable
Variables.Description: Is this component safe to ID over the network by name?

Variables.Name: bEnableTickWhenOutOfRegion
Variables.Description: If true, this component will Enale Tick when out of region.

Variables.Name: bAutoActivate
Variables.Description: Whether the component is activated at creation or must be explicitly activated.

Variables.Name: bIsActive
Variables.Description: Whether the component is currently active.

Variables.Name: bCanEverAffectNavigation
Variables.Description: Whether this component can potentially influence navigation

Variables.Name: bIsEditorOnly
Variables.Description: If true, the component will be excluded from non-editor builds

Variables.Name: bNeedsLoadForClient
Variables.Description: If false, the component will be excluded from client builds

Variables.Name: bNeedsLoadForServer
Variables.Description: If false, the component will be excluded from server builds

Variables.Name: AssetUserData
Variables.Description: Array of user data stored with the component

Variables.Name: bCreatedByConstructionScript_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: True if this component was created by a construction script, and will be destroyed by DestroyConstructedComponents

Variables.Name: bInstanceComponent_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: True if this component was created as an instance component

Functions.Name: IsBeingDestroyed
Functions.Description: Returns whether the component is in the process of being destroyed.

Functions.Name: GetOwner
Functions.Description: Follow the Outer chain to get the  AActor  that 'Owns' this component

Functions.Name: ComponentHasTag
Functions.Description: See if this component contains the supplied tag

Functions.Name: Activate
Functions.Description: Activates the SceneComponent

Params.Name: bReset
Params.Description: - The value to assign to HiddenGame.

Functions.Name: Deactivate
Functions.Description: Deactivates the SceneComponent.

Functions.Name: SetActive
Functions.Description: Sets whether the component is active or not

Params.Name: bNewActive
Params.Description: - The new active state of the component

Functions.Name: ToggleActive
Functions.Description: Toggles the active state of the component

Functions.Name: IsActive
Functions.Description: Returns whether the component is active or not

Return.Description: - The active state of the component.

Functions.Name: SetAutoActivate
Functions.Description: Sets whether the component should be auto activate or not. Only safe during construction scripts.

Params.Name: bNewAutoActivate
Params.Description: - The new auto activate state of the component

Functions.Name: SetTickableWhenPaused
Functions.Description: Sets whether this component can tick when paused.

Functions.Name: SetIsReplicated
Functions.Description: Enable or disable replication. This is the equivalent of RemoteRole for actors (only a bool is required for components)

Functions.Name: ReceiveBeginPlay
Functions.Description:
Blueprint implementable event for when the component is beginning play, called before its Owner's BeginPlay on Actor BeginPlay
	  or when the component is dynamically created if the Actor has already BegunPlay.

Functions.Name: ReceiveEndPlay
Functions.Description: Blueprint implementable event for when the component ends play, generally via destruction or its Actor's EndPlay.

Functions.Name: SetComponentTickEnabled
Functions.Description: Set this component's tick functions to be enabled or disabled. Only has an effect if the function is registered

Params.Name: bEnabled
Params.Description: - Whether it should be enabled or not

Functions.Name: IsComponentTickEnabled
Functions.Description: Returns whether this component has tick enabled or not

Functions.Name: IsComponentTickEnabledByExternal
Functions.Description:
Returns whether this component has tick enabled or not,
	  Which set by External business

Functions.Name: SetComponentTickInterval
Functions.Description: Sets the tick interval for this component's primary tick function. Does not enable the tick interval. Takes effect on next tick.

Params.Name: TickInterval
Params.Description: The duration between ticks for this component's primary tick function

Functions.Name: GetComponentTickInterval
Functions.Description: Returns whether this component has tick enabled or not

Functions.Name: K2_DestroyComponent
Functions.Description: Unregister and mark for pending kill a component.  This may not be used to destroy a component that is owned by an actor unless the owning actor is calling the function.

Functions.Name: SetTickGroup
Functions.Description: Changes the ticking group for this component

Functions.Name: AddTickPrerequisiteActor
Functions.Description: Make this component tick after PrerequisiteActor

Functions.Name: AddTickPrerequisiteComponent
Functions.Description: Make this component tick after PrerequisiteComponent.

Functions.Name: RemoveTickPrerequisiteActor
Functions.Description: Remove tick dependency on PrerequisiteActor.

Functions.Name: RemoveTickPrerequisiteComponent
Functions.Description: Remove tick dependency on PrerequisiteComponent.

Functions.Name: ReceiveTick
Functions.Description: Event called every frame
